description: Hayeong generates bpy scripts that blender_tool.py executes headless. She never adds export calls — blender_tool injects them from export_format param.
must_know: Script must NOT contain export calls — blender_tool.py adds export automatically.
Always clear the default scene first: select_all('SELECT') + delete()

params.blender_script: Full Python bpy script as a string
params.timeout: Seconds before killing Blender (default 120; use 300+ for complex scenes)

gpu: RX 7900 XTX (ROCm). NEVER use the RTX 3090 — that GPU is LLM-only.
